who: real estate portfolio managers managing 5–15 properties
offer: For real estate portfolio managers processing 5–15 properties, inaccurate tracking of rents causes financial discrepancies. We provide automated monthly statements instead of manual spreadsheets and email statements.
problem: Inaccurate tracking of rents and occupancy costs leads to financial discrepancies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for real estate managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to real estate managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing management tools
try_it: Let users try rent tracking on 1-3 properties
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with a clear CTA
Short demo video of the manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
